race.comment: Another tough finish. OWL WITNESS (2) missed the placings two runs back then was always well out of his ground last start when 8 lengths away in 14th over 1600m at Swan Hill. Doesn't win many but back to his pet trip now and can improve. LACEMAKER (6) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing sixth at Echuca over 1200m. Like the switch to synthetic now, respecting. GARGANTUAN (1) came home strongly last start to finish second, beaten one length, over 1100m at Wodonga when fresh from a break. Fitter and should be right there. SWEET 'N' SPICY (4) is stepping out at this course for the first time. Last appeared when she finished seventh over 1100m at Bordertown on June 28. Well placed and can contest.
